title: Cover Metaphors
description: A reference-dependent series of four square magazine-cover illustrations sharing the same decorative border, watercolor line style, and editorial metaphor grammar.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes a fictional highbrow magazine cover language: thin hand-drawn border, restrained watercolor palette, centered visual pun, and blank masthead area. Images 02-04 reuse that cover grammar for AI labor, social-network loneliness, and climate anxiety.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Cover Metaphors
en.description: A reference-dependent series of four square magazine-cover illustrations sharing the same decorative border, watercolor line style, and editorial metaphor grammar.

zh-CN.title: 封面隐喻系列
zh-CN.description: 四张参考依赖的方形杂志封面插画，共用装饰边框、水彩线条和编辑隐喻语法。
